name: Rescue-ACE HQ
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｒ－ＡＣＥ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レスキュー・エース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヘッドクオーター
desc: While your opponent controls a monster, all "Rescue-ACE" monsters you control gain 500 ATK/DEF. During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Rescue-ACE" monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) Once per turn: You can target 4 of your "Rescue-ACE" cards that are banished and/or in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 1 card.
eff: While your opponent controls a monster, all "Rescue-ACE" monsters you control gain 500 ATK/DEF. During your Main Phase, you can Normal Summon 1 "Rescue-ACE" monster, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.) Once per turn: You can target 4 of your "Rescue-ACE" cards that are banished and/or in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 1 card.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
